items.title: OpenAI ends Disney partnership as it closes Sora video-making tool
items.dek: The move comes less two years after the launch of the AI video app sent shockwaves through the media industry.
items.body: The move comes less two years after the launch of the AI video app sent shockwaves through the media industry.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tough negotiations loom as Denmark's Social Democrats fail to secure a majority
items.dek: The party, which has governed since 2019, gained the most votes but saw its weakest results in over a century.
items.body: The party, which has governed since 2019, gained the most votes but saw its weakest results in over a century.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Democrats flip Florida seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
items.dek: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.
items.body: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.
